A2: Set, the Discount, and Why People

Source topic: The Lego Game Boy makes for a great gift, and it’s $10 off today

Quality checked lesson

Discussion

Open question 1 · opinion

Do you think the Lego Game Boy is a good gift for game fans? Why or why not?

Open question 2 · personal experience

Have you ever bought something because it reminded you of your childhood or a happy memory? What was it?

Open question 3 · comparison

How is the Lego Game Boy different from the real Game Boy from 1989?

Open question 4 · comparison

Would you prefer to buy the set with the discount at Kohl’s or at a store that needs a membership? Why?

Open question 5 · opinion

What do you think is the most important part of this set: the price, the design, or the memories it brings back?
